# Ledger-form Plan

Exercises the legacy ``## Phase phase_NNN: <title>`` header form. The
parser captures the id with ``phase_id_source="explicit_header"`` and
the renderer migrates it to the canonical ``<!-- phase_id: ... -->``
comment form per design doc section 7.1.

## Phase phase_001: Bootstrap

- [ ] T-000001: bootstrap task one
- [ ] T-000002: bootstrap task two

## Phase phase_002: Implementation

- [ ] T-000003: implementation task
  - [ ] T-000004: nested implementation task
